name: BNB PLUS CORP.
summary: BNB Plus Corp. is a digital asset treasury (DAT) company that has adopted BNB, the native cryptocurrency of the Binance blockchain ecosystem, as its primary reserve asset. The company seeks to accumulate BNB and generate yield through staking, liquidity providing, and DeFi strategies. It also operates LineaRx, Inc., a subsidiary commercializing proprietary cell-free nucleic acid (DNA and RNA) production solutions for biopharmaceutical and diagnostics markets.

products.name: BNB Digital Asset Treasury Strategy
products.description: Accumulation and yield generation of BNB cryptocurrency via staking, liquidity providing, Binance Launch Pool participation, and DeFi collateralization strategies.

products.name: LinearDNA / LineaIVT
products.description: Cell-free manufacturing platform for DNA and RNA production used in gene therapies, mRNA therapeutics, DNA vaccines, and diagnostics.

products.name: OBNB Osprey BNB Chain Trust Units
products.description: The company holds Trust Units in OBNB Osprey BNB Chain Trust (OTCMKTS: OBNB) with plans to sell or redeem for additional BNB.

partnerships.description: Company strategy centers on BNB ecosystem including Binance Launch Pool participation, BNB Chain staking, and DeFi opportunities on Binance-affiliated platforms.
Company plans to provide liquidity between Lista Dao liquid staking derivative token and BNB on the largest BNB DEX to generate yield.

partnerships.partner_name: Osprey Funds (OBNB Osprey BNB Chain Trust)
partnerships.description: Company holds Trust Units and seeks to coordinate with the trust administrator to redeem underlying BNB assets for its BNB Strategy.
